scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @loce/shared" "npm run dev -w @loce/server" "npm run dev -w @loce/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @loce/shared && npm run build -w @loce/server && npm run build -w @loce/client
scripts.build:client: npm run build -w @loce/shared && npm run build -w @loce/client
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w @loce/shared && npm run build -w @loce/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @loce/shared && npm run typecheck -w @loce/server && npm run typecheck -w @loce/client
scripts.test: npm run build -w @loce/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
